title: Dark Thoughts
lyrics: Oh, darkness creeps on all of us The moment we open our eyes Dark heart, dark star, long dead No way for me to take it away from my mind Been down to the barrel of the mellows Found the darkness in my friend, man, don't shy away from your own path You dark tunnels of an introspective mind view There are these dark thoughts always creeping on me When the light shows, there's always this edge of fantasy reality Stuck in the doldrums of dark thoughts, dark heart, dark star Baby, know where my mind began to meet, end up being As your friend, there's something good inside your mind, it's all creeping in from the noise These dark hearts hollow the way By all that ever could go astray Single down and judge these dark thoughts, make me want to Check out, put the AK, put the AK, put the AK, man, I'll kill at 23, I wanna make it my way This should never be the case, it never should ever go down like that in anyone's mind To be pushed away from such society, do not even know which way is free Is it left, is it right, which way do I come from to take the dark thoughts away? Was it always these dark thoughts, dark heart, dark moment always taken? The hope, the lights, but I'm gray and lost within, lost within Family to the family, brother, brief brother Women hating women, what do we come with? Undercover of hope, not there anymore, the veil is clear, we place it all over our eyes We're surprises in our own heart, we all tell our wives We're surprises in our hearts that turn dark at home These are all moves of hope It's just these dark thoughts that keep me under most I'm doing the most, the most I'm always doing the fucking most These dark thoughts are me Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: Oh, darkness creeps on all of us The moment we open our eyes
Dark heart, dark star, long dead No way for me to take it away from my mind
Been down to the barrel of the mellows Found the darkness in my friend, man, don't
shy away from your own path
You dark tunnels of an introspective mind view
There are these dark thoughts always creeping on me
When the light shows, there's always this edge of fantasy reality
Stuck in the doldrums of dark thoughts, dark heart, dark star
Baby, know where my mind began to meet, end up being
As your friend, there's something good inside your mind, it's all creeping in from the noise
These dark hearts hollow the way
By all that ever could go astray
Single down and judge these dark thoughts, make me want to
Check out, put the AK, put the AK, put the AK, man, I'll kill at 23, I wanna make it my way
This should never be the case, it never should ever go down like that in anyone's mind
To be pushed away from such society, do not even know which way is free
Is it left, is it right, which way do I come from to take the dark thoughts away?
Was it always these dark thoughts, dark heart, dark moment always taken?
The hope, the lights, but I'm gray and lost within, lost within
Family to the family, brother, brief brother
Women hating women, what do we come with?
Undercover of hope, not there anymore, the veil is clear, we place it all over our eyes
We're surprises in our own heart, we all tell our wives
We're surprises in our hearts that turn dark at home
These are all moves of hope
It's just these dark thoughts that keep me under most
I'm doing the most, the most
I'm always doing the fucking most
These dark thoughts are me
Thanks for watching!
